series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting customer support interactions managed through the ServiceNow Customer Service Management (CSM) module, including cases, interactions, emails, notes, surveys, and attachments. Used by DAS service areas, customer service and success teams, quality assurance staff, and leadership to document communications, resolve issues, and evaluate service delivery.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Maintain in ServiceNow cloud environment for 3 years after the last customer interaction, then move to archive status for 1 year, then destroy., Electronic: Delete
